species: the number of tRNAs containing m3C modifications has been expanded to include mitochondrial (mt) tRNA-Ser-UGA and mt-tRNA-Thr-UGU.
cell_type: we show that m3C formation in human mt-tRNAs is dependent upon the methyltransferase-Like 8 (METTL8) enzyme.
